meaning: adj.[占星术] 五分之一对座的(相隔72度)n.[天]五分之一对座
examples: All five quintiles imagined the top quintile to possess about 60 percent of the nation's wealth.
The third depicted Sweden, where the top quintile accounts for 35 percent of the nation's wealth.
Published survey reports were included in the analysis if they contained HIV testing data and wealth quintile rankings.
Between 2001 and 2007 44% of households in this group moved up at least one quintile.
This growth has fueled a top quintile return on invested capital ( ROIC) of 31%.
